## What does this change?

<!-- A short description. Which layer/package does it touch? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] I enabled the git hooks (`bash scripts/install-hooks.sh`)
- [ ] If I changed `packages/**`, I updated **both** book editions
      (`book/ru/chapters/` **and** `book/en/chapters/`) so the book still
      matches the code — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Docs/typo fixes were applied to **both** language editions

<!--
The book and the code move together — that's the whole point of this project.
The pre-commit hook enforces it, but please double-check here too.
-->
